TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Pasumaq, title = Pasumaq, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Pasumaq} }

S.FORM: alang Pasumaq ga niya mki sku Heto Keng atu Rayiyong go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 109 buwan, 339 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 94% kyan ku 320 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 6% kyan ku 19 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Paywan 92%, Rukay 1%, Bunun 1%, Amis 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 1%. rhzyal kki'an tay mkyahu' na Pasumaq hya' ga Tjacekes. tay 'zil na Pasumaq hya' ga Yungkilu. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh

alang Pasumaq ga niya mki sku Heto Keng atu Rayiyong go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 109 buwan, 339 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 94% kyan ku 320 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 6% kyan ku 19 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Paywan 92%, Rukay 1%, Bunun 1%, Amis 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 1%. rhzyal kki'an tay mkyahu' na Pasumaq hya' ga Tjacekes. tay 'zil na Pasumaq hya' ga Yungkilu. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ pas~ɕumaq ɣa nija mki s~ɕku ħeto keŋ atu rajijoŋ ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, pajwan **%, rukaj *%, βunun *%, amis~ɕ *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. rħzjal kkiʔan taj mkjaħuʔ na pas~ɕumaq ħjaʔ ɣa tjaʦ~ʨekes~ɕ. taj ʔzil na pas~ɕumaq ħjaʔ ɣa juŋkilu. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
